scripts.build: npm run build -w @chat/contracts && npm run build -w @chat/api && npm run build -w @chat/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @chat/web && npm run lint -w @chat/contracts && npm run lint -w @chat/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @chat/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @chat/api && npm run typecheck -w @chat/web
scripts.verify:precommit: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
